name: Glass Chorus
explanation: A pristine hi-fi stereo chorus/flanger combo. Two fractional delay lines (one per channel) are read with linear interpolation and modulated by quadrature LFOs so the left and right voices sweep in counter-phase for a wide, glassy stereo image. A single Mode control morphs the effect from a lush, gently detuned multi-voice chorus into a short, sweeping flanger comb; the Feedback control adds the resonant flange whoosh, Width spreads the stereo voices and Depth/Rate shape the sweep. The signal path stays clean with no saturation or grit. Controls: Rate, Depth, Mode, Feedback, Width and dry/wet Mix.
